runs.note: Migrated from OAuth implicit flow to authorization code flow with PKCE. Key changes: (1) Changed response_type from 'token' to 'code', (2) Implemented PKCE with S256 method using cryptographically secure code verifier/challenge, (3) Added state parameter for CSRF protection, (4) Updated handleCallback to exchange authorization code for tokens using PKCE verifier, (5) Changed token storage from localStorage to memory for security compliance.
